content: I am perhaps biased as I have not tried other, similar apps. But I very much like how this one presents the options available to you.

Everything but the introduction is paywalled. I do not need an app to notice what affects mood. Downloaded for the mental health resources, but will use something that offers a chance to text the benefits before charging.
It is good app but you cannot change te language
good
I'm going to try this out because I hear voices in person and sometimes they can be mean or insulting
no depth just cheep commercial like advice but u may have a different openion so try it and see 4 ur self

I started using this app back in 2019, when it was still called Moodpath. This app helped me understand my symptoms and patterns, making it easier to navigate my mental health day to day. Because I used it consistently, I never came to therapy or doctor appointments with a blank mind. I used the notes from the app to guide discussions, and my doctor even said it made working with me easier. A simple but powerful tool that truly supports professional care.

This app is great and it's completely free! You check in with your mood and answer a handful of questions a few times a day (all private of course), you can look at any of the material, there is a course you can follow, depending on what you feel you need (like if you are exhausted, or if you want to increase strength mentally and physically, etc). Highly recommended!
So far I love this app. comprehensive insight, accurate and helpful information, and more in a well put together application. Nice work y'all.
great site
So far it has helped me with stress, so it really has been helpful I just don't want some half-done therapy approach. Do far so good!
helpful.
literally just got the app and now im starting to get better
Installed to see if information is correct, current, valid, reliable, usable. thx.
ThiNk YoU
Cool app I think it's going to be worth the money

Very informative and embarks one on a journey of self revelations. Also along the way equipping someone with factual references of information & insight about their various personal issues we all endure as commonalities. This in turn instills someone's positivity about innate ability for growth of self-confidence and resolve should one go up the road to self- acceptance of human conditions & to explore trending therapeutic non pharmaceutical treatments lastly unto psychology/psychiatric advice
it's good

Useful. Better than a lot of other apps. I recommend it. But, I removed 1 star as info on the methodology of calculating the results is not sufficiently apparent - how is it done and how robustly has it been tested?

It's a really great app, unfortunately it shares device IDs with third parties (according to Play) which is not optional and does not work offline. I like the idea but tracking is an absolute no go with apps that handle data this sensitive.
I'm a new user but definitely enjoying the features.
soo bad
I'm sure this app is great but it's mostly locked and for paid members. I couldn't get much out of it without paying. Could potentially be used as a mood tracker but not much else.
Amazing app satisfied
doesn't help

I can not afford this app however it looks fantastic. I'll see if my dr will help if not I'll just have to stick to free or cheaper ones. Dr said he'd help pay but this one's quite expensive so I really don't know. looks helpful though

so far I've found this app really helpful, although when it asks about thoughts to end your life it pops up with a chat that asks if you want to be connected to an anonymous lifeline or a friend/family member - the lifeline is a telephone number to call, which is inaccessible for many (deaf/HOH people for example, or for me it's because I struggle with verbal shutdowns due to autism). perhaps offering the SHOUT text service number as well would be a good option to remedy this

really helpful ☆edit☆ WELL now I have been using this app for two weeks and damn I never thought it would be this perfect. Literally this is the best app I have ever downloaded in my entire life. No, this really helps and made me seriously consider the therapist step and made me pay attention to myself. When I responded to a question about having suicidal thoughts, there was no underestimation of the matter. Now I sent the therapy a REBORT based on the application and it is 100% realistic!!!!
it's nice to use
total wichtige App . ich empfehle sie .

just a money grab like the rest of them. If u don't pay, your wasting your time as I have been for the last 4 years. There are way better ones out theere, 10 times better, that don't require to be fit into our tight budgets. It's just too bad. Adios amigos. Good luck with your journeys.

I had a very disappointing experience. As a mood tracker, it is too basic compared with a multitude of other apps. It's USP? It asks you questions 3 times a day for 2 weeks, at the end, you are told you need to consult a therapist. Which surprise, surprise, Minddoc can recommend one at $65 per week. It is utterly useless for me being unable to afford this and also in the UK. An app designed to exploit people's mental health fears for money
good pace. good match for content. 3x Daily check in to track mood.
Right away requires a user account be created and the mandatory terms include you have to agree to the sharing of your personal and health information. NOT FOR ME!
mindDoc is a really great app for journaling and tracking moods because sometimes we ourselves don't know what we're feeling. These exercises help us clear our thoughts greatly.
Puts results behind a paywall after using for 14 days, thus making it useless
installed 3 days ago and i like it so far. though it's checkin on me by asking questions only

I always look forward to the questions because I never know what it will ask. I am 3 weeks into the mindfulness. it has a place to write down my thoughts. this is nice because it's like a safe place where I can do so. every 2 weeks, it analyzes and gives you the analysis, which is helpful.
Seems like my own psychiatrist, I kinda like it.
This app helps me stay grounded.
not getting notifications to answer the questions

Pretty good app that I have used every day for two years or so. The bi-weekly results are a great way to see a sort of big picture of how I'm feeling. update 3/31/25 - The only negative I have to say about this app now is that it keeps asking me to leave a review every other day despite the fact that I already left a review (THIS review) a good three years ago.
Has pertinent questions
Great app, would be better if you could secure with a pin code but its otherwise great
Thanks for my daily dose of reflection. :)
Very helpful /thoughtful questions about my mental state. It's funny how just reflecting on and acknowledging my current mental state can bring calm.
This app helps me a lot to keep tracking my emotions. I can write down what i feel, so it will be useful for me.

What a useless app, answered questions for 14 days to get a 'report' which told me my mental health was poor, well duhhh, that's why I was using the app, questions about Covid which was 5 years ago and are not relevant, and wanting to charge extortionate amounts.
This app proveides lots of questions that made me reflect on my day to day mood and also plenty of tips to face some particular situations.
The amazing app
Helpful
This app is really helpful I've been struggling along and to see that it checks up on me thorough the day makes me happy

I just love this app, its so professional. it was recommended by my doctor, I find it really helpful to find the focus among the many feelings and thoughts, I enjoy the exercises a lot, they are really useful and clear, and I also love the daily insights and short reads. I highly recommend!
Good way to monitor and understand myself emotionally.
Good app. I have had a lot of good experiances using it.
Pay wall to fill version
Free trial only... They ask for way too much personal information only to tell you to pay. Very deceiving..
Brings a lot of encouragement due to it's well-targeted personalized questions and feedback.
An amazing app! Worth every penny for the pro version

ok so what's hard is knowing I'm not ok, no fault of mine, and the price of healing is far more than I can afford expecially as I lost my job (again) due to the trauma inflicted upon me as a child I need to over come this but the tools and resources are only available if I'm a productive member of society and I cant learn and heal and work. If only I could qualify for some kind of special service or a discount. Thank you for what I can use. I appreciate your app and the efforts it took to launch
They charged me for 50 minutes when I had consultation 25 minutes. i visited the psychologist and explained my situation, and she said she couldn't help and I had to pay 153 euro for that, -5*
Very good for knowing what to tell the doctors
So far so good

I loved using this app every day for over a year. It was very helpful. Then I accidentally subscribed to the app, immediately cancelled it and requested a refund, which was refused. It's pretty disappointing, the app really helped but their lack of caring about the users of their app is gross so I quit using it.
Just a matter subscription, and you're good to go to be more self aware

Helpful to have daily reminders to track my mood! I also likes that it gives you reports on your overall mental health as you track. I think that the emotion choices are a bit limited--for example, I'm surprised "stressed" isn't on there. But overall a good app!

I've found this app super useful so far. I like the way it asks a few simple questions each day and uses that to recommend different activities in the app. The activities at super useful and informative and really help. It's super useful alongside my therapist because it gives me topics and thoughts that I can discuss with them. I also like the mood tracker
I love the app. Works like magic and helps me concentrate more on my feelings with the good questions.
Too much paid things
Impossible to login

Have been using the app for about 4 weeks now. Great to track your moods and get nice insights with background information about how to improve your moods and life as well as nice information about mental health issues and their solutions

For the most part I actually like this app it helps me to try and figure out what types of things that triggers so I can bring it to the and to also learn to stop over thinking every lil' thing as well
Helpful and empowering!
It is nice to give my feelings labels and to see how my mood is over time. It makes me more aware of my issues and that I need help.

Hi, too much text and sentences. Just imagine that I'm not a very patient user so basically I can't read all those sentences to help me. I got really bored I didn't engage me. I would prefer a better UI for users who are bored and stressed. You can personalize and classify based on their need and their problems. If someone is a stressed right now that person cannot answer a lot of questions.
The pay wall for the tools is frustrating but I understand why.
Very insightful but Needs a program for the financially inadequate. It's already tough to seek help let alone afford it.
Ok
Stuck in setup because it is not possible to use anonymously as advertised on the website. In step 3 I have to log in or create an account. No option to skip.
Listen, if 90 percent of the app is unusable without purchasing a subscription just make the app paid instead. Otherwise, it just feels exploitative.
Useful insight 📛

I've only been using it since yesterday and so far the app itself is nice and I like it, but the only thing I don't like is the shilling for Betterhelp. If you don't know, Betterhelp is not a trustworthy resource and have been known to be damaging to patients. I don't like feeling like I need to dodge being advertised to or getting mixed up with a shady business when I'm trying to improve my mental health.
I like this app so far , I got a few days ago. It's helping me understand things about myself that has been hard to explain.
Helps you enjoy your life?

This application offers a wide range of beneficial topics and articles, as well as mental & emotional support skills.《essential for personal growth/self-awareness.》Though,, it would be greatly appreciated if some of the features were made available, esp w/o requiring a subscription. This would ensure that individuals who are struggling w/structural mindset, goals, mental health, & individuals could truly benefit from the app's resources aren't discriminated against & excluded
Not open! Crashed...
Very good app. I used it every day.
very nice app, helps me keep track of how im doing. The way its done is warm and gentle.
helps me to get aware of my problems, behaviour

So far I think it's really great!! It helps me to check in with myself in calm and orderly fashion. It helps me to be more self-reliant, self-aware, aware in general, thoughtful, mindful of myself and surroundings and so much more!!!
5/5 would recommend! sometimes the questions don't fit to the "does it bother you?" follow up, but it makes up for it
Helped me during a hard time. Just focusing on dealing with emotions.
Great app, very helpful!
Questions are repetitive after a while. Reports are not valuable. Feedback feature doesn't seem to work properly

Its an ad for betterhelp, which is a horrible company. Its initial insights are only helpful to those who have never had therapy or a diagnosis, which is fine because its just initial insights but I doubt it will have anything actually insightful at 14 days. I also wish I could set the day to start at a different time as I sleep night shift hours EDIT: I was able to find where to adjust when it asks the questions. The insights after my 2 weeks were not insightful to me
Complete waste of time. You will not have anything useful after your subscription starts.

I coincidentally downloaded MindDoc right before beginning my therapy journey 4 years ago. It has been very cool to see it develop and grow over time. I've never used the "extras" much. I'm a data person, so I've always been very consistent with the check-ins. Every so often, I take the results to therapy to show off how things have changed and that has been SO rewarding! This app didn't make those changes happen, but it helped me notice trends and patterns to help myself make them happen. :)
Great free mood tracker with actually helpful questions. I haven't tried the paid version bc the free version does what I needed.
Very good
Never made it past the consent page because I actually HATE apps that do not know how to color coordinate pages that are washed out by the same color. Inconsiderate and Shady
Great way to track your fault mood with prompts to remind about filling out the journal. Easy to use highly recommended. I only wish I could afford the full version though.
Dreimal am Tag die Möglichkeit, verschiede Fragen zu beantworten und die Stimmung zu tracken. Sicherlich hilfreich, um mit meinem Therapeuten darüber zu sprechen

I really like this app. Its great for mood tracking and helpful in practicing self-awareness/recognizing your patterns and behaviors. If you are on top of logging into the app every morning, noon, and night for like a week or two, you'll get your results so fast and even after you get results they still track for more, I also like the many varietal questions, some are a bit personal but thats what makes the app real. I think that there should be more check in emotions like fear or jealousy
No unsolicited, unwanted, unwarranted advice from people who don't even know you. It's great.
The question: Do you feel sad or down? Needs a third Answer,like: I don't know(How I feel).

It's a really good app. It has an easy database and stores questions and has them relatively easy to answer. I redownloaded the app as I joticied my mental health was going. It is a great tool and I highly suggest it! Especially if you almost always have your device with you. I like to take like five minutes each question period to do that and some relaxing thing to just.. ground myself.
Good routine

Truly, I’ve never encountered an application as fascinating as this one. I deeply appreciate the creators who conceived such useful applications and decided to assist those in need. Even though I can’t participate in the paid version, I’m genuinely content with the free version. If there were more than 5 stars, I’d gladly give them all to you.” ❤️❤️❤️
amazing app

Great app, BUT there is currently an error when you try to sign up to premium membership. It's impossible to upgrade at the moment, so I cannot use any premium features. I've sent an email about this, and I was told that there is a known issue and it would be resolved soon. However, it's still not resolved and I still cannot upgrade. Resolve the issue and I will change my rating. Thanks 😊
While questions can be repetitive and free version provides limited options, I do find it helpful for trends. However, it would be useful to be able to download the weekly records.
I wish there were more free things on this app such as the exercises, and reading material, bc I found it to be very helpful yet I don't have the $ to pay anything.

I love this app so much. It had helped me through the worst times and really feels like a companion when you need it most. It was recommended to me by a therapist years ago and I've used it every day since, it's so helpful for tracking your moods but also gives insights into different mental health conditions and coping strategies. It's very informative and there are free courses you can do to understand mental health better. It's helped me so much, so thank you to the developers ❤️
Nice

Some questions seem not to take a status quo into account: have you reached goals? When I do not even have goals. Edit Four stars removed because you keep nagging me to rate the app ON A DAY I TOLD YOU I WAS FEELING BAD Get off my back! Edit. I've come off my sad rage. And think 4 stars is fair, even tho the Dev's answer does not make sense Edit: Back to 2 stars for asking me again to rate. Again on a "very bad" day.
Just trying to sell you better help
Good
Any decent features are locked, and it's just an ad for better health
Véry helpful wish I could get thé whole àpp,
Anything helps
This app has been life changing! Highly recommend! I've tried at least a hundred different mental health apps and I've never seen anything like this one!
Favorite app, I just wish I can get a free premium subscription for a reason.
Not worth paying for
Would be better if some of the all the time options were "sick" and "injured". I might be doing okay when I am sick mentally but I don't feel "good" and I would like to mark why.

IMHO I don't know if I would do it but it does seem like a good app and scientific, maybe I'm just looking into too much. I think I'll read the bible more.
Very helpful and professional
Great reminders to check in with myself, and they offer thoughtful and accurate feedback!
it has been really helpful for me to track my mood throughout the period of time and also helps my therapist understand how my mood has been like every two weeks to better understand my situation.

I've been using the app for a few months. The frequency of the check-ins is insightful and helps me identify the areas in which I struggle consistently as well as show me where my improvements have been. It's like a little mental and emotional health companion.
Good to make you feel better and to write your feeling down

I was a little hesitant that I was going to lose interest in this but I haven't and I don't think I will. I'm reminded 3 times a day to answer a couple questions on my mental health and then I describe how I'm feeling in this moment and I'm really enjoying it!
Amazing!!! This app is simply one of the best I've used. Love it. Toll!!! Diese App ist einfach eine der besten, die ich je verwendet habe. Liebe es.
This app has been so dead on that it's scary yet accurate. I've learned a lot about why I think like I do and what triggers my anxiety. Definately worth trying .
I don't like its logging in method.
It's helping me a lot. I have h thorid in my neck

The concept is great and I would love to have access to the content but it seems like after logging your questions and answers for a while theres nothing else im able to do without paying for it. Im all for support and donations but I think the cost is too much honestly.
It's a good app to be honest with yourself. I am very happy with this app as I feel safe to express myself knowing that it's private. I would definitely recommend this app to my friends and family.

So far this app is been amazing for me it helps me keep on track with being aware of my mood how I'm feeling and things that I didn't even realize we're a issue they asked me questions and it's like Clarity
Don't pay, they have not customer support. They don't have a trial period. They will deduct money before trial period and then there's no way to get refund
This a great adjunct to therapy. Highly recommend.
I like it, 3 times a day it asks how you're doing, so throughout the day you're basically doing small Journaling entries.
Very helpful,gets me through the day
Great app ! Really insightful!

This app has really helped put into words how I am feeling. The periodic check ins throughout the day have become something I look forward to. I can also record my mood at other points in the day, and that helps me process my emotions. Seeing the patterns and what is reoccurring in my daily life has been eye-opening.
Good for realizing yourself

A great app to use for anyone who has trouble figuring their problems out with a therapist or can't see one. I have the premium version. It helps me to figure out my mood patterns, how to control my mood better, and advises me on what to do when I'm feeling certain things. There is a lot more I could say, but those are the biggest positives to me.
absolutely useless. just a fancy mood tracker.
Good application for use to keep track of your daily life.

I've been using this app for a couple months now. The questions are starting to get mildly repetitive, but at the moment while I'm making medication changes, this has been helpful to keep an eye on my emotional state throughout the process. I really enjoy getting new questions to answer all the time.
Easy Simple convenient

Your app does not take disabled people into account and they disproportionately suffer from mental illness. Many questions are geared towards work, which I am unable to do. I've also been asked if I'm afraid of becoming seriously ill. I'm already seriously ill. You assume that everyone using this app is physically well and able to work. It is erasure of disabled people. Please consider consulting with people from the disabled community on how to include us.
This has honestly helped me want to achieve my objectives and be better I appreciate this app so much I needed it...

I highly recommend this app. If you want an app that you can log in constitenly to check your mental well-being at not cost, this is perfect for you. It asks relevant questions based on what you've answered. What's got me annoyed, though, is that the insights aren't free. How am I supposed to get better if I can't read the insight? These app creators keep forgetting that some of us are in college or are underage and don't have the financials to pay. But overall, it's a good app.

I didn't expect this app to be as good as it is. It's helped me navigate through the aftermath of my panic disorder and gave me helpful tools for the future. The questions being asked 3 times a day can be overwhelming at times, but what I've found is that if you're busy or need to take a break from it, the app recognizes that and stops sending notifications after being ignored for a few days. I ended up buying the annual subscription and have recommended it to many of my friends and loved ones!
I like the questions throughout the day. It makes me stop and recenter to see how I'm feeling.

I'm really trying to use the app to cope with losing my mental state after losing my pregnancy at 7 months almost dying and having a hysterectomy at 32.. I'm finding it satisfying in a way nothing else did. I didnt want to do support groups and this was a good alternative.
It's an absolutely amazing app! The results are extremely accurate, and they provide very helpful insights! I hope to see more in the app in the future, however.
This app is helping me discover things about myself that I didn't know about and also giving me solutions on how to tackle some of the negative things.
very useful app, would suggest it to everyone, beautiful, easy to use and totally insightful
I really enjoy the app, but my daily questions only shows pictures so it's hard to understand, I have to figure it out apart from that I love the app♥️
El mejor mood tracker que he usado.

This is a great app overall, wish it was free to use the rest of the app but what is free lol. Thankyou. Learning so much from the rest of the app now that I accidentally paid for it I'm so glad I did!
So far so good. I just wish morevungs were free

So far so good. I like that the questions are different every time. Answering the questions and adding a journal entries makes me take a pause to reflect on how I am doing in the here and now. The insights are pretty cool. I wish there were more emotion options. I am not sure yet, if it is worth it for me to pay but the free version is working.
Nice
Not a free App. Requires subscription after 1 week trial. $35.00 for the rest of year and then $69.99 for full year.
It used to be better but a lot of features got locked behind a paywall
Helping me so much! Option to send results to my Dr office, which was a great help. I'm loving it. Recommended to friends.
It is an amazing app. It is extremely helpful and insightful if you really try, and you stick with it.
It's Been a new, bittersweet journey helping to keep track of my mental health, getting insightful quick descriptions & having options laid out for me pertaining to my life from day to day.
Very on it! In depth questions make you really think.
it is really useful

It was 5 stars before I realized some I formation you can only get through a "meditation." I would rather put mashed potatoes in my ear than have someone talk to me like that. So far I have not seen an option to read the info. Besides that I really like the app and I see myself using it long term as long as I don't keep running into that tone.

I haven't had this app for very long, but I already really like the information it has to offer. It's been helpful in understanding my emotions and I really like the insights the app gives. I definitely recommend this app for people trying to understand themselves and their emotions :).

All in all this is is the best app I've found that asks frequent questions that let's me get an idea of my mental health state. The questions are varied (there's probably 45 different ones) and can include personalized topics such as finances and Covid. I'm a free user so it restricts most of the stuff I can listen to. But overall, it's really good.
This does really help.
Typical Money Grab
Really Impressive! Just started using this.
Very good app and helps put my mind in focus
I use the app to take a moment just to check in with myself, and it seems good for that.
I've been using this app for years, can't recommend enough
Loving it!
very good
Very insightful app.
Shady........ ty
Easy to use, very good and helpful app
A very helpful tool! Thank you so much💙💛
This works pretty well for mindfulness. It keeps me in check with how I'm feeling throughout the day and gives prompts that can help me figure out trends and triggers.
This app has helped me to journal my feelings and find out my emotional health so I am better able to see where I need help and also where I am getting better. Thank you!

Omgoodness is only I had the money to afford this app because it helps me in so many ways! I have been helped sooooooo much by this app, you wouldn't believe it! It doesn't get anymore awesome h perfect than this in an app! Thanks to the developers!

I've been trying to keep a journal for years and I'm just terrible at it. I've been using this app for about 5 weeks and this is the first time I've successfully kept up with something like this! It's been very helpful to track my mood and I like that I can go back and read my entries. I do wish the "emotions" board had some more options to choose from but it's not bad. The push notifications 3 times a day is very helpful, I usually get at least one entry in per day because of the reminders.
This app (along with DBT and my therapist) has helped me more than I would've thought. The premium price is well worth it.
Brilliant app very helpful 👏
This app is easy to use and helps me to evaluate my feelings and show a pattern. The questions are easy to answer and helpful.
Great!

Seems great but only people with expendable income could possibly use it... The kind of people that buy Starbucks every day. Far too expensive, and I'm very disappointed that all the apps I find are trying to make money off of sad and desperate people. It would be much cheaper to buy a freaking book, which I'll probably end up doing. This seems like it would be beneficial, but I can't get ONE course for free.. like nothing. No free content. Middle finger up with all the enthusiasm.

For the creater and or mastermind behind this app is a freaking GENIUS!! SERIOUSLY GENIUS! Thank you also for whoever did come up with this! I extremely recommend this. it's worth every penny for the plus your struggling with your emotions and depression and anxiety it's unlike any other mental health app out there this one is by far the best one I've ever tried so if your truly wanting to be better to get better inside you for you even if you can't afford a doctor okay this app changed my life!
It helps ig

It's nice having something remind you to answer some questions and write stuff down so that you don't have to make time for a normal journal out of your day that you ask remember to actually do. And there are no judgment as it's not a person, it gives insights and it's helpful, it helps yourself to be insightful. They give you insights about all the things you're saying. If you want to be conscious about how you're feeling, and how that can impact you, get it. Thanks
It still needs a lot of improvements.
Sometimes the app glitches but I have been using for 3 years and I always recommend. It is very handy in keeping track when you cannot tell if you are in hard place.
Only been using a few days. So far so good. I hate the reminders come at odd times and I miss them.
Great app, learn how your mood works throughout the day, week, month, etc.
I like mindDoc. it's almost like someone cares about you

The app is free and has you do all the leg work to buy in and think Maybe this app can help? And then it wants an excessive monthly subscription. To what, talk to a counselor. It is what it is. Maybe I'm missing out but I have insurance to speak with a counselor and why bait a user in the beginning.

When it works as intended, very useful! However it often does not actually record entries, especially on stressful/bad days, and then gives you the message that you need more entries for a more accurate result... I've even uninstalled and redownload and the issue does not fix. Worse, it sometimes effects later entries and thus your day looks better/worse than it actually was. This issue has been off and on over the years of me having this app, but has gotten far worse recently..

It is a very good app, and one course per month and daily question are very good features, but if you want to access full courses, you have to purchase subscription. But unfortunately subscription model is not friendly with indian market. But anyway, thanks.

This app is exactly what I needed to help me with my anxiety and depression. The app asks questions 3 times a day and tracks your mood. It then gives you insights on how to make situations better. There are also classes to help you manage your life a lot better. I tried to speak to a counselor today but was told it would be 3 months before I could even get in. But this app is so amazing and insightful that I believe that this is all I need. This is a must have!

Simple and effective. You can tell that the developers put a lot of effort into this app. The only thing I can think of that could be improved is that the questions are getting a bit repetitive. Adding a few more would be great. Overall an amazing app :)
Great self help tool giving insights on your mental state

I love the app and questions they ask. It really help with the assessment you get every 14 days. It shows you were you are struggling. A lot of different topics you can read about. I told several people about it.
Second time getting the app absolutely love the app! Looking forward to monitoring myself! Update subscribed again for the third time! Well worth it!! Highly recommend!

I feel this is a very helpful app . But I think the discovery part should be free to everyone , coz not everyone is capable of paying of course for the treatment not free . But for the knowledge and knowing thr content abt you should be for everyone and free. No offense but it would be better if there is no subscription or payment for knowing the content .
It WAS perfect, until you guys made a bunch of stuff "premium only". BUT, still worth installing.

Another one-week-free app then pay-through-the-nose. Maybe our HSE might create a simple, free app for those of us who could not find ANY medical or psychiatric help this past month when desperately unwell. Sad that apps like this can get away with enticing the mentally ill with a free offer and then charging a large sum to those who forget to de-register (sadly a lot of us have memory probs) it's another slap in the face. There needs to be a way to adjust when you get reminders. I get my evening reminder at 6:30. I'm usually not even home by then, so getting the notification so early is pointless. It would also be nice if you could adjust the displayed experiences/emotions instead of having to type things in every time.
